svg.text: scene length = quantized bar gap between consecutive locators. _scene_lengths_in_bars turns drag-imprecise time into clean uint8 bars.

g.text: six locators dropped in ableton, slightly off the bar lines. tracks a/b/c/d hold clips of varying lengths.
light gridlines = bar boundaries. each locator snaps to its nearest integer bar. ~50ms of drag-slop is harmless.
int via python round-half-to-even — fine here
scene lengths = bar gaps between consecutive locators
trailing scene closes against arrangement_length_sec (28.36s → bar 16). result clamps to 1..255.
— single locator, no length → defaults to 2 bars
— trailing gap ≤ 0 → median of preceding gaps
— non-pow-of-2 gaps preserved (3-bar = take five says hi)
